author: ocln-content
desc:
The wall between crypto and traditional finance just got a little smaller. 🧡

A French company, Spiko, has become the first European tokenized money market fund to accept subscriptions and redemptions directly in stablecoins.

No bank transfer.
No conversion back into fiat.
No unnecessary friction.
json_metadata: {"app": "peakd/2026.6.14", "format": "markdown", "description": "And perhaps that's when blockchain will finally become mainstream. When nobody has to talk about it. \ud83e\udde1", "tags": ["spiko", "coibase", "crypto", "news", "advocacy", "offchain", "luxembourg", "innopay"], "users": [], "image": ["https://files.peakd.com/file/peakd-hive/ocln-content/23xyvZqSvo3ETsG4kxgc5tTnR6jnmKGQ83Vq4Jg8VpjediTn9q1XBVgJn5vo5C4CznUJ5.png"]}
title: The wall between crypto and traditional finance just got a little smaller. 🧡
